benefit_text:
Various Locations
                                                            
    Map
Various locations throughout Massachusetts: Locations | Mass.gov



Each pass admits allows free parking for one vehicle at over 50 day-use facilities in the state parks system that charge a parking fee.

This pass must be returned to the Reference Desk by 10:00 am on the day after use. If the Library is closed on the day after use, it is due the next day the Library is open.
Annual membership of $300.00 provided by the Friends of Thayer Public Library.
Physical (must be picked up at the library and returned) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
